name: tools.activateGroup
description: Activate a tool group to make its tools available. Tool groups include: 'analytics' (cost/performance metrics), 'admin' (billing/rate limits), 'agents' (agent management), 'compliance' (audit/policy), 'development' (files/github), 'execution' (workflows/boards), 'bci' (behavior-conditioned inference), 'infrastructure' (amprealize/raze).

group_name.description: Name of the tool group to activate
